summary: Iteration 131: CakeDesigner3D testing FAILED due to React Three Fiber version incompatibility. @react-three/fiber@9.6.0 and @react-three/drei@10.7.7 require React 19, but app uses React 18.3.1. The Cake Builder tab loads but shows 'Cake Builder could not be loaded' error. Same error affects EchoAiLauncher component.

integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL: React Three Fiber version incompatibility - @react-three/fiber@9.6.0 requires React 19 but app uses React 18.3.1
integration_issues.error_message: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'S') at createReconciler (@react-three_fiber.js)

integration_issues.issue: Same R3F version incompatibility causes EchoAiLauncher to fail loading
integration_issues.error_message: [Lazy] Failed to load EchoAiLauncher: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'S')

action_items: CRITICAL: Downgrade @react-three/fiber from 9.6.0 to 8.x (compatible with React 18)
CRITICAL: Downgrade @react-three/drei from 10.7.7 to 9.x (compatible with React 18 and @react-three/fiber@8)
Alternative: Upgrade React to 19.x (major breaking change, not recommended)
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: Package version mismatch - @react-three/fiber@9.6.0 peerDependencies require 'react: >=19 <19.3' but app has react@18.3.1
CRITICAL: @react-three/drei@10.7.7 peerDependencies require 'react: ^19' but app has react@18.3.1
The CakeDesigner3D.tsx code is well-structured with proper R3F components (Canvas, OrbitControls, ContactShadows, etc.)
EchoCanvasStudioIntegrated.tsx correctly wires the Cake Builder tab to load CakeBuilderModule

success_rate.frontend: 0% - CakeDesigner3D fails to load due to R3F version incompatibility

verified_features.FRONTEND_pastry_module_opens: PASS - Pastry module opens from sidebar
verified_features.FRONTEND_pastry_studio_section: PASS - PASTRY STUDIO section visible with ECHO CANVAS, CAKE BUILDER, TECHNIQUES
verified_features.FRONTEND_cake_builder_tab_visible: PASS - Cake Builder tab visible in EchoCanvasStudioIntegrated
verified_features.FRONTEND_cake_builder_tab_clickable: PASS - Cake Builder tab is clickable
verified_features.FRONTEND_cake_designer_3d_loads: FAIL - Shows 'Cake Builder could not be loaded' error

root_cause_analysis.details: @react-three/fiber@9.x requires React 19, but the app uses React 18.3.1. This causes a TypeError when R3F tries to create its reconciler.
root_cause_analysis.solution: Downgrade to @react-three/fiber@8.x and @react-three/drei@9.x which are compatible with React 18

context_for_next_testing_agent: CakeDesigner3D cannot be tested until R3F version is downgraded. The component code looks correct but fails at runtime due to React version mismatch. After fixing versions, test: 1) 3D viewport renders cake, 2) Add Tier button works, 3) Auto-rotate toggle works, 4) Shape/frosting selectors work, 5) Cost estimate updates.
